author: Grzegorz Nowosielski
name: PR114 RunPod H100 SXM Triple Rerun
blurb: Same-provider RunPod H100 SXM verification of the PR114 long-context selective-precision recipe. Best rerun reached 1.15536852 val_bpb at 15,963,195 total bytes, but the live public leaderboard had already moved to 1.1428 by packaging time, so this is submitted as non-record.
